About us

Hi, I'm Saakshi Jadhav Founder & LinkedIn Growth Strategist · Brand Hive Socials

I started Brand Hive Socials because I saw a pattern I couldn't ignore. Brilliant entrepreneurs and high-impact leaders were building remarkable businesses and solving real problems, yet their online presence rarely reflected their expertise. The issue wasn't talent - it was the absence of the right system, so I set out to build one.

That system turned visibility into opportunity - helping founders convert attention into inbound growth and measurable business results. Today, we don't create noise or generic content. We build authentic LinkedIn brands across our service packages, ensuring your presence earns the recognition your work has always deserved.

Book a discovery call → LinkedIn →

Meet the Founder behind the brand

FAQ.

FAQ.

Got questions? We’ve got answers. Here’s everything you need to know about working with us.

Who is this service for?

Founders, CXOs, and B2B leaders who want LinkedIn to drive authority and qualified leads - not vanity metrics. Whether you need The Foundation, The Immersion, Lead Generation, Refined, or Company Page Branding, we match the package to where you are and where you want to go.

Will my posts actually sound like me?

Yes. Every package that includes content starts with a discovery questionnaire and voice capture session - your tone, stories, and point of view stay intact.

How long before I see results?

Most clients see stronger impressions, profile traction, and inbound conversations by month three - when strategy, content, and outreach have time to compound.

Do I need to be active online myself?

No. We handle writing, publishing, design, and outreach based on your package. You stay as visible or as private as you prefer.

Who all will be working on my account?

A dedicated team: strategist, ghostwriter, social media manager, graphic designer, and - for lead-gen packages - a lead generation specialist.

What's the minimum time commitment?

Three months minimum. That's the runway a LinkedIn brand needs - enough time to build strategy, publish consistently, and let outreach compound.

Is Sales Navigator included, or do I pay extra?

Included in The Immersion and Lead Generation, Refined. Your Sales Navigator Advanced subscription is bundled - nothing extra on top.
